name: Michelle Johnston Holthaus
background: Michelle Johnston Holthaus is Executive Vice President and General Manager of the Client Computing Group. She has been with Intel since 1996, serving in various leadership roles in sales, marketing, and business management, including as Chief Revenue Officer.

company_affiliations.name: Intel Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various senior executive roles, including Executive Vice President, Chief Revenue Officer, General Manager of Sales, Marketing & Communications, CEO of Intel Products, and Interim Co-CEO.
